name: Linear Agent
description: Linear OAuth + AgentSessionEvent webhook bridge with registered agent tools (routes under /linear-agent)

agentId.description: OpenClaw agent to handle Linear events (default: 'dev')

linearClientId.description: OAuth client ID from the Linear application

linearClientSecret.description: OAuth client secret from the Linear application

linearWebhookSecret.description: Webhook signing secret configured on the Linear app

linearTokenStorePath.description: Absolute path for persisted OAuth tokens (default: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.pi/linear-agent-tokens.json)

startOnCreate.description: On session creation, move the issue to the team's first 'started' workflow state (default: true)

delegateOnCreate.description: On session creation, self-delegate the issue to this app if no delegate is set (default: true)

historyLimit.description: Max prior agent activities to fetch for prompted events (default: 20; 0 disables history fetch)

strictAddressing.description: If true, only process prompted events whose body explicitly @-mentions the configured handle (default: false)

mentionHandle.description: Mention handle used by strictAddressing, e.g. 'personal-openclaw' (the bare handle without the leading '@')

historyLimit.label: Max prior activities for prompted runs
